mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_login_log ( id, user_id, username, login_ip, user_agent, login_status, message, login_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{loginIp}, #{userAgent}, #{loginStatus}, #{message}, #{loginTime} )

INSERT INTO sys_operation_log ( id, request_id, user_id, username, module_name, operation_name, request_method, request_path, request_ip, request_params, status, duration_ms, error_message, created_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{requestId}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{moduleName}, #{operationName}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestPath}, #{requestIp}, #{requestParams}, #{status}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdTime} )
